PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RETANA, MAURICIO ANTONIO GARAY, RICARDO ALFONSO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR PAYMENT SCHEDULE IN EFFECT- SEE AWARD FOR CONDITIONS. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS OF SUIT.
